{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Lisha
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lisha]] is the [[First Elder]]'s niece.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
